Uses of Enum Class
org.moeaframework.core.indicator.StandardIndicator

Packages that use StandardIndicator
Package
Description
org.moeaframework
Convenience classes for using the MOEA Framework.
org.moeaframework.core.indicator
Collection of unary quality indicators for comparing the quality of non-dominated approximation sets.

    Description

    Analyzer.AnalyzerResults.getIndicators()
    Returns the indicators that are included in these results.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Set<String>
    Analyzer.AnalyzerResults.getSimilarAlgorithms(String algorithmName, StandardIndicator indicator)
    Returns a set of algorithm names that produced statistically similar results as the given algorithm.

    Analyzer.AnalyzerResults.getStatistics(String algorithmName, StandardIndicator indicator)
    Returns the descriptive statistics for an algorithm.
